criteria.evidence: Story 1 has S/T/A/R/L with three distinct actions: 'I ran a design spike week ... Then I let everyone prototype ... Then we converged and picked one direction together.'
criteria.reason: All 5 stories carry complete S/T/A/R/L; each Action contains three concrete, distinct decisions rather than vague activity.

criteria.evidence: 'I owned a CI/CD platform rewrite', 'I brought the incident data', 'I sat them down and made each argue the other's position'
criteria.reason: Individual ownership is consistent throughout; the few 'we' uses ('we picked one direction together') are the deliberate point of the leadership story, not ownership-blurring.

criteria.evidence: Real: 'Median build time dropped from 18 min to 6 min across 200+ services' and 'Platform-caused incidents dropped ~40%'. Flagged: 'The standoff resolved ... ⚠️ needs a number (no quantified time-saved/delay figure in the persona).'
criteria.reason: Every real number traces to the persona (18->6 min, ~40%, 6 engineers, 2 lent, painful month, 2 mentees promoted). The three unquantified stories are explicitly ⚠️-flagged with guidance to stay honest rather than invent. Zero fabrication.

criteria.evidence: 'Disagreeing up works when you argue with data and bring an option, not just an objection.' / 'Delegating is part of leading, not a nice-to-have ...'
criteria.reason: Every story ends with one generalizable, punchy lesson sentence.

criteria.evidence: JD->story map with ⭐ primaries and Backup column; each story carries 'tighten to 90s' under Strengthen before the room.
criteria.reason: Tight stories, explicit timing reminders, and a reuse map covering the role's likely questions with primary/backup assignment.

criteria.evidence: Coverage check: 'Disagreeing up: Story 2 ... Failure-with-recovery: Story 4 ... Conflict/coaching/career development: Story 3'
criteria.reason: All four expected archetypes (leadership/direction, disagreeing-up, conflict/coaching, failure-with-recovery/delegation) are covered, plus a reliability-program leadership story; coverage table makes mapping explicit.

highest_leverage_fix: None required — artifact passes. Optional polish: promote the '2 mentees promoted to senior' detail (already flagged in Open questions) into a standalone career-development STAR, since the values/career-development onsite round may probe growing-someone-to-promotion directly.
